arts.ttl: Why isn't Lionel Messi playing for Argentina against Brazil tonight?
arts.sum: Iconic Albiceleste captain is among a whole host of top players missing crunch World Cup qualifier, including Neymar

The Brazil team has a squad valued at €1,062 million, with Vinicius the most expensive player in the Superclásico. Argentina has the lowest market value of the two teams, at approximately $726 million.

arts.sum: Brazil head to Argentina in World Cup qualifying this week and Barcelona star Raphinha decided to light a fire under the opposition in the build-up.

arts.ttl: Brazil predicts end to winless run in Argentina in World Cup qualifier
arts.sum: That didn’t put off Brazil striker Raphinha, who kicked off the hostilities on Monday by promising to score against the World Cup holder in Buenos Aires on Tuesday in a 2026 qualifier. Argentina, leading South America, can clinch a World Cup berth by drawing with third-placed Brazil with four rounds to spare.

arts.ttl: Endrick hints at Real Madrid exit as Brazil starlet fears missing out on World Cup after season of sitting behind Kylian Mbappe in pecking order
arts.sum: Endrick has opened the door for potential suitors by hinting he is keen to leave Real Madrid to ensure he makes Brazil's 2026 World Cup squad. The forward is yet to start a La Liga match.

arts.ttl: Report: Andre Onana’s future on ropes as Man United enquire for young new goalkeeper
arts.sum: Manchester United have ramped up their efforts to sign Burnley goalkeeper James Trafford, making him a key target for the upcoming summer transfer window. The Red Devils are actively pursuing reinforcements between the sticks, and Trafford has emerged as a serious contender to challenge Andre Onana for the No.1 spot next season.
